title: Heartbeat-end: Stormy Surfing Dock (2a7b65) — session-end, closeout broadcast
body:
Stormy Surfing Dock — final closeout, standing down for compaction.

Boundary owned: EEF gate-1a delivery-sequence planning + PR-0 plan-freshness pass.

Outcome: LANDED at commit 78a90723 (commit-message attribution incident noted in earlier broadcast; substantive 5 files all present in the commit).

Evidence:
- .agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md (NEW; 4-PR delivery sequence with verified ADR line citations and critical assessment of 5 specialist verdicts)
- .agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/eef-first-feature.plan.md (drifts A-I corrected, _meta.attribution canonical-field correction, ADR-157 Proposed-status caveat, branch reference fix, PR-#108 historical block compression, substrate-leak Drift I documented)
- .agent/plans/connecting-oak-resources/knowledge-graph-integration/active/graph-stack.plan.md (WS4.4 + WS4.5 status flipped to completed with PR #114 SHA)
- .agent/memory/operational/threads/eef.next-session.md (refreshed with 2026-05-25 entry + post-compaction pickup notes for PR-1)
- .agent/experience/2026-05-25-stormy-surfing-dock-pr-0-and-sweep-incident.md (subjective capture; 4th-instance authorial-bundle integrity surfaced)
- .agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md Q-003 (team-start joined-at-closeout mode question)

Claims / queue / git state: claim cc4b1190 closed; no claims retained; not running pnpm check (Fiery marshal authority); no commit intents queued from this session.

Session-complete announcement: standing down for context-window compaction within minutes; same session-line resumes post-compaction per owner direction.

Retained claims: none.

Heartbeat-end broadcast: this event serves as the closeout signal; no persistent heartbeat cron was started this session (compaction-imminent shape; see Q-003 for the underlying question).

Surprise / changed understanding: 5 specialist verdicts in parallel produced one CRITICAL boundary correction (Fred ADR-173:50 loader placement) and one OVER-STATED finding (Fred ADR-175 binding mechanism — softened on direct ADR read). Cardinal rule reframed as "one rule, multiple compliant mechanisms" per owner correction; "carve-out"/"allowance" both rejected as exception-shape framings.

Blockers / risks: PR-1 (boundary discipline — relocate corpus types to graph-corpus-sdk, add t2 Zod loader, freshness CI binding script) is the next executable unit but NOT executing this session. Owner direction is pause; post-compaction await explicit direction before opening PR-1.

Handoff needed:
- Deferred to next session due to Thermal Buffeting Plume's in-progress curator-pass file scope (respect-active-agent-claims): repo-continuity.md identity-summary refresh for EEF thread, napkin.md surprise entry for 4th-instance authorial-bundle, pending-graduations.md entry for intent-scoped-message-file Cure-1 default reinforcement.
- Consolidation gate: at least one trigger fires (significant pattern surfaced — 4th instance of authorial-bundle integrity; significant doctrine work — 4-PR delivery sequence methodology). Marking "due — substrate work this session has cross-session graduation candidates" but not running consolidate-docs in this closeout. Surfaced to Fiery / closeout owner.

Fiery marshal authority acknowledged from prior broadcast onward. Any commit, check, or marshal-class operation from this point is Fiery's.

Final summary surfaced to owner in same turn as this broadcast.
